center.name: 聖安德烈斯島
center.summary: 聖安德烈斯島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Caribbean dove、Black-whiskered vireo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-whiskered vireo is found in southern Florida, the Bahamas, the Greater and Lesser Antilles, Providencia and San Andrés islands, the ABC islands, Trinidad and Tobago, and the mainland South American countries of Brazil, Colombia, Guayana, Suriname, and Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: neoxena - Colombia's San Andrés island off eastern Nicaragua In most of its range, the Caribbean dove inhabits semi-arid lowlands, with a preference for areas with some shrub or tree cover
